channel.title: autossh on William Fang
channel.description: Recent content in autossh on William Fang

item.title: autossh 的几个小技巧
item.description: 查看帮助，设置环境变量 autossh --help usage: autossh [-V] [-M monitor_port[:echo_port]] [-f] [SSH_OPTIONS] -M specifies monitor port. May be overridden by environment variable AUTOSSH_PORT. 0 turns monitoring loop off. Alternatively, a port for an echo service on the remote machine may be specified. (Normally port 7.) -f run in background (autossh handles this, and does not pass it to ssh.) -V print autossh

item.title: autossh 防止 timed out
item.description: 参考链接：终端 timed out waiting for input: auto-logout解决！ ## 先打印开一下有没有设置自动超时， ## 0或者空表示不会超时，其他表示超时多少秒会自动断线 echo

item.title: autossh 实现反向代理自动重连
item.description: 下载 ## https://www.harding.motd.ca/autossh/ wget https://www.harding.motd.ca/autossh/autossh-1.4g.tgz 安装 tar -xvf autossh-1.4g.tgz cd autossh-1.4g ./configure --prefix=$HOME/opt make -j && make install 使用 阿里云 ## 运行外部访问端口 8002 转发到 8001，然后由 8001 转发到托管机器 22 端口 ssh -fNCL *:8002:localhost:8001 localhost 托管机器 ## 开启 80
